title: Amtech H0900 3 Piece Centre Punch Set
features: DURABLE: This centre punch set is made from heat treated carbon steel for strength and durability
EASY TO USE: With ribbed, non-slip grips and knurled bodies with square striking heads, the punches are designed to easily set nails and brads for a smooth finish
SIZES: 100mm (4") in length, the set includes sizes 1/16", 3/32", 1/8"
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering.
